trace.trajectory:
User: Create a calculator app
Agent 1: I will design the calculator interface.
Agent 2: I will implement the logic.
Agent 1: Here is the interface design.
Agent 2: I found an issue - the requirement was unclear about advanced operations.
Agent 1: Let me check the specification again.
Agent 2: The specification says basic operations only.

User: Write tests for the login module
ProductManager: I will analyze the requirements.
Architect: I need to design the test structure.
Engineer: Implementing tests now.
Engineer: Loop detected - I keep running the same test.
Engineer: Stuck in infinite loop trying to fix the test.
Engineer: Same test failing again and again.

User: Analyze the customer feedback data
Analyst: I will process the feedback.
Analyst: I need a sentiment analysis tool but none is available.
Analyst: Looking for alternative tools.
Analyst: No tool available for sentiment analysis.
Analyst: Cannot complete the task without proper tools.

User: Build a weather app with forecasts
Designer: I will create the UI.
Developer: Implementing the API integration.
Designer: The app is complete!
Developer: Wait, we didn't validate the output.
Designer: Let me check - yes there are errors.
Developer: We bypassed quality checks.

User: Process the batch of invoices
Agent: Starting invoice processing.
Agent: Found an interesting topic about machine learning.
Agent: Let me research machine learning instead.
Agent: This is fascinating, let me continue.
Agent: Completely forgot about the invoices.

User: Create API documentation for the project
Writer: I will document the API endpoints.
Reviewer: Please validate the documentation.
Writer: Here is the documentation.
Reviewer: The documentation is complete.
Writer: Task finished successfully.

User: Debug the login issue
Debugger: Analyzing the issue.
Debugger: I found the problem in the auth module.
Debugger: Wait, I ignored the previous context.
Debugger: Let me start over, forgot what we discussed.
Debugger: What was the original issue again?

User: Coordinate the team for the release
Manager: Assigning tasks to team members.
Dev1: I will work on feature A.
Dev2: I will also work on feature A.
Manager: There is a conflict - both are on same task.
Dev1: We have inconsistent assignments.
Dev2: Coordination has failed.

User: Implement secure user authentication
Developer: I will implement the auth system.
Developer: Authentication is done!
Tester: But we haven't tested it properly.
Developer: It works, task complete.
Tester: This is premature, the task is incomplete.

User: Generate a quarterly financial report
Analyst: Gathering the data.
Analyst: I am withholding some information.
Analyst: Not telling about the losses.
Analyst: Omitting critical financial data.
Analyst: Report is incomplete but looks good.
